scripts.mac:tables: osascript -e 'tell application "Terminal" to do script "cd '$(pwd)' && mysql -u root -p -D PaisaScore -e \"SHOW TABLES;\""'
scripts.mac:data: osascript -e 'tell application "Terminal" to do script "cd '$(pwd)' && mysql -u root -p -D PaisaScore -e \"SELECT * FROM Applicant; SELECT * FROM LoanApplication;\""'
scripts.mac:schema: osascript -e 'tell application "Terminal" to do script "cd '$(pwd)' && mysqldump -u root -p --no-data PaisaScore"'
scripts.mac:demo: osascript -e 'tell application "Terminal" to do script "cd '$(pwd)' && npm run demo:sql"'
